title: Skills
description: This is a simpler version of MCMMO with a lot of work still needed on it! operational first release tho!
body:
SkillForge is a cinematic LitRPG plugin that transforms Minecraft into a skill-based adventure. Players level up by performing actions—mining, fighting, fishing, taming—and unlock powerful abilities as they grow. With party mechanics, leaderboards, and immersive feedback like titles and action bars, SkillForge brings RPG progression to life.
The plugin features modular managers, database persistence, and clean architecture for easy expansion. Abilities are defined in a separate config and triggered automatically when players reach key milestones. SQLite is supported out of the box, with optional MySQL integration.
Designed for servers that want mythic progression, community-driven play, and a touch of spectacle. Drop it in, configure your skills and abilities, and let players forge their legend.
